basic_details.job_title: NHSRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 14 Video Editor, Senior Content Writer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC), New Delhi, on behalf of MoHFW
basic_details.short_information: The National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC), New Delhi, on behalf of the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare (MoHFW), has invited online applications for 14 contractual posts in the SNA (Strengthening National Achievements) Section, covering media, creative, and content roles such as Videographer, Photographer, Graphic Designer, Content Writer, Strategy Coordinator, and more. Eligible graduates with relevant experience can apply online at nhsrcindia.org before 22 July 2026.

application_fee.details: Not specified in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Age limits vary by post and are calculated as on 1 January 2026: | Below 41 years: Videographer, Photographer, Senior Media Executive, Sr. Graphic Designer, Strategy Coordinator, Creative Coordinator, Senior Content Writer, Media Executive, Video Editor, Media Assistant Below 36 years: Jr. Graphic Designer, Junior Content Writer, Media Coordinator Below 58 years: Lead Photographer

qualification.details: All 14 posts require a Graduation Degree as the essential minimum qualification, with post-specific relevant experience and, for a few posts, a specialization in Journalism/Mass Communication or Literature (see the Vacancy Details table above for exact requirements per post).

salary_details.details: Remuneration ranges from Rs 28,000 to Rs 1,00,000 per month depending on the post (see the Vacancy Details table above for exact ranges). All selected consultants are entitled to an annual increment of 5% per annum upon renewal of their contract, which may be given for up to five years of engagement at a particular level.

selection_process: Not specified in the official notification. The notice states that applications are being invited from qualified candidates purely on a contractual basis; it does not detail a written test
how_to_apply: Visit the official NHSRC website: nhsrcindia.org
Locate the online application form for the relevant SNA Section post.
Fill in the online application form correctly and completely.
Submit the application in the prescribed online format only, before the last date.
important_instructions: Applications will be accepted only in the prescribed online application format available on nhsrcindia.org. Each post has a single vacancy (Position: 01). All engagements are purely contractual. The last date for receiving applications for all 14 posts is 22 July 2026. All posts report to the Addl. DG (Media)/Chief of Media & Communications, MoHFW/Media & Communications Officer, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare.

content_sections.heading: Roles and Responsibilities (Post-Wise)
content_sections.text: Recording high-quality video messages and documenting key meetings, events, and official engagements of Ministry Divisions. Managing live streaming of significant events on the Ministry's official social media platforms, including camera, audio, lighting, and connectivity setup, and real-time troubleshooting. Ensuring timely delivery and dissemination of video content with consistent production quality. Desirable Qualification: Certificates in Videography, Photography, Fine Arts, Photo/Video Editing, and Video Production; prior Govt/PSU/Autonomous Body videography experience preferred. Ensuring comprehensive visual coverage of events, meetings, and conferences at Kartavya Bhavan 1 and other designated venues. Providing timely, high-quality photo and video documentation of official engagements, speeches, and interactions. Systematically organizing and archiving media, and supplying visuals for press releases and social media updates. Desirable Qualification: Certificates in Photography, Fine Arts, Photo Editing and Printing; prior Govt/PSU/Autonomous Body photography experience preferred. Overseeing media, communication, and creative activities of assigned Ministry divisions. Collaborating with division officials and the media team to ensure accurate, prompt, and professional dissemination of information. Desirable Qualification: Additional qualification in Mass Communication/Journalism; Govt/PSU/Autonomous Body experience desirable. Translating creative briefs from Ministry officials or the Team Leader into visually compelling designs. Conceptualizing and producing illustrations, logos, and creative assets tailored to the target audience. Deciding on colour schemes, typography, layout, and overall visual composition; maintaining an organized, backed-up design asset databank. Desirable Qualification: Certificates in Graphic Designing; media/news setup work experience an added advantage. Leading the planning, execution, and delivery of all media and communication-related projects in coordination with senior Ministry officers. Translating communication objectives, policy priorities, and creative vision into effective strategies and outputs. Defining project scope, timelines, deliverables, and resource requirements; preparing presentations, briefs, and communication materials for senior officers; providing team leadership and mentorship. Desirable Qualification: Prior experience as a Team Leader in a media setup, preferably handling social media teams. Working with Ministry officials to translate project vision and objectives into impactful creative outputs. Identifying resource requirements, setting timelines, and overseeing creative development; collating data, content, and creative inputs across divisions. Coordinating presentation of project creatives to senior officers, incorporating feedback, and ensuring timely approvals. Desirable Qualification: Experience handling media setups and divisions in Govt/PSU/Autonomous Bodies preferred. Creating e

content_sections.heading: Eligibility
content_sections.text: All 14 posts require a Graduation Degree as the essential minimum qualification, with post-specific relevant experience and, for a few posts, a specialization in Journalism/Mass Communication or Literature (see the Vacancy Details table above for exact requirements per post).

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age limits vary by post and are calculated as on 1 January 2026 : Below 41 years: Videographer, Photographer, Senior Media Executive, Sr. Graphic Designer, Strategy Coordinator, Creative Coordinator, Senior Content Writer, Media Executive, Video Editor, Media Assistant Below 36 years: Jr. Graphic Designer, Junior Content Writer, Media Coordinator Below 58 years: Lead Photographer

content_sections.heading: Salary
content_sections.text: Remuneration ranges from Rs 28,000 to Rs 1,00,000 per month depending on the post (see the Vacancy Details table above for exact ranges). All selected consultants are entitled to an annual increment of 5% per annum upon renewal of their contract, which may be given for up to five years of engagement at a particular level.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Not specified in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Not specified in the official notification. The notice states that applications are being invited from qualified candidates purely on a contractual basis; it does not detail a written test, interview, or shortlisting criteria.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Not specified in the official notification. Candidates are advised to keep educational certificates and experience documents ready, as these are typically required at the time of filling the online application or during document verification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Visit the official NHSRC website: nhsrcindia.org Locate the online application form for the relevant SNA Section post. Fill in the online application form correctly and completely. Submit the application in the prescribed online format only, before the last date.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications will be accepted only in the prescribed online application format available on nhsrcindia.org. Each post has a single vacancy (Position: 01). All engagements are purely contractual. The last date for receiving applications for all 14 posts is 22 July 2026 . All posts report to the Addl. DG (Media)/Chief of Media & Communications, MoHFW/Media & Communications Officer, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare.

faq.question: Q1. How many posts are advertised under NHSRC MoHFW SNA Section Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 14 contractual posts are advertised, each with one vacancy: Videographer, Photographer, Senior Media Executive, Sr. Graphic Designer, Strategy Coordinator, Creative Coordinator, Senior Content Writer, Media Executive, Jr. Graphic Designer, Junior Content Writer, Video Editor, Lead Photographer, Media Assistant, and Media Coordinator.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for NHSRC MoHFW SNA Section Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving applications for all 14 posts is 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these NHSRC posts?
faq.answer: All posts require a Graduation Degree as the essential minimum qualification, with post-specific years of relevant experience; a few posts (Strategy Coordinator, Creative Coordinator, Senior Content Writer, Junior Content Writer) require or prefer a degree in Journalism/Mass Communication or Literature.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for NHSRC SNA Section contractual posts?
faq.answer: Salary ranges from Rs 28,000 per month (Media Coordinator) to Rs 1,00,000 per month (Strategy Coordinator), depending on the post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for NHSRC MoHFW SNA Section Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by post: below 41 years for most posts, below 36 years for Jr. Graphic Designer, Junior Content Writer, and Media Coordinator, and below 58 years for Lead Photographer, all calculated as on 1 January 2026.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for NHSRC MoHFW SNA Section Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official NHSRC website, nhsrcindia.org, by filling the prescribed online application form correctly before the last date.
